productDisplayName: Vans Men Era Black Casual Shoes
description: vans brings you footwear for the urban youth. Inspired by skate boarders, Era shoes come in a classic skate board friendly design. Team these with cargos or jeans and graphic tees. Upper Fabric uppers for durability and comfort Stitch detailing for reinforcement and added style Lace-ups for a snug Fit Padded collar and textile lining for extra comfort Brand tab on the forefoot and brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
